title: Melinoe
description: A QOL mod for Telos Realms which focuses on customizability and ease of play.
body:
![Melinoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee2ea3080b57d6aabcf8d69af4c56727652c8ed6.png) # What is Melinoe? **Melinoe** (formerly Aphrodite/Zagreus) is a lightweight, all-in-one Fabric mod designed specifically for **Telos Realms (MC Version 26.1.2)**. It specializes in visual enhancements, extensive stat tracking, and providing essential quality-of-life features that the base game lacks. Our core objective remains the same: **Consistency and Reliability**. Melinoe is made by the players, for the players. We are committed to pushing consistent updates so you're never left behind when you need us the most. --- ## ✨ Features Melinoe has been heavily expanded, and it is split into four categories accessible via the ClickGUI:

### Combat *Master every fight with precise tools, from cooldown tracking to visual ability ranges.* * **Ability Cooldown:** Customizable audio & text displays when your abilities are off cooldown. * **Weapon & Ability Range:** On-screen range circles for your abilities and weapons. * **Assassin Stacks:** Visualization HUD for Assassin stack counters. * **Nature's Gift Cooldown:** Custom status HUD, audio, and title displays when your NGift proccs. * **Auto Clicker & Auto Sprint:** Automatically swing & sprint at all times.

### Visual *Customize your HUD for maximum visibility, awareness, and performance.* * **Health Related:** Featuring a smooth, customizable Health Bar and a Health Indicator that flashes warnings and plays sounds when HP drops to pre-determined levels. * **Armor HUD & Hide Armor:** View your currently equipped gear, and visually hide armor on yourself and other players. * **Performance HUD:** Visualization HUD for FPS, TPS, and Ping. * **Dungeon Timer:** Track your dungeon completion times and personal bests directly on the HUD. * **Player Size:** Fully adjust the scale (X/Y/Z) of your player model. * **Others:** Built-in Fullbright and a Chat Filter to reduce spam.

### Tracking *Stay informed of your progress with detailed tracking systems.* * **Session Manager:** Track total playtime, location times (Nexus, Dungeon, Realm), and fame gained per session. * **Lifetime Stats:** Keep a log of your total runs and all the different bag drops. * **Boss Tracker:** A HUD and waypoint system for realm bosses. Automatically tracks boss status (Available, Fighting, Defeated/Portal) and allows you to Quick Teleport to a player called by the boss. * **Pity Counter:** Tracks and displays your pity count for items from the current boss/dungeon.

### Miscellaneous * **Discord RPC:** Show off your character, location, and dungeon status directly on Discord. * **Custom Leaderboard:** A modular, redesigned leaderboard that integrates seamlessly with your Dungeon Timers and Pity Counters. * **Advanced Keybinds:** Instantly open specific menus, perform a callout, or quickly toggle options. ---
⚙️ Installation & Setup ### Requirements: 1. Download the latest version of Melinoe. 2. Place the `.jar` file in your `.minecraft/mods` folder. 3. Launch **Minecraft 1.21.10** with **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** & **[Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)** installed.

### Navigating the Menu: * **Open the ClickGUI:** Press **Right-Shift** or type `/melinoe` (aliases: `/mel`, `/m`) in chat. * **Configure Modules:** *Left-Click* a module to toggle it on/off. *Right-Click* to expand its detailed settings. * **Edit your HUD:** Run `/melinoe edithud` to enter edit mode. * Drag any enabled HUD element to reposition it (elements automatically anchor to the nearest screen border). * Scroll while hovering (or use `+` / `-` keys) to scale HUD elements. * Use arrow keys for precise 10-pixel adjustments. * **Helpful Commands:** Type `/melinoe help` for a full list of commands, including `/melinoe tps`, `/melinoe ping`, and `/melinoe pity `. *(Note: All settings save automatically when you close menus!)*
## 💬 Support, Bugs & Suggestions Melinoe is constantly evolving. While mod file updates will be posted here on Modrinth, all detailed patch notes, bug reports, and suggestions are handled exclusively through our Discord & GitHub.

 

--- *Disclaimer: Melinoe is not inherently vouched for by Telos Realms. However, we ensure that every feature present in the mod is completely compliant with Telos rules and will not result in a punishment.*
